case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JULIO CESAR LOYA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JULIO CESAR LOYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JULIO CESAR LOYA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JULIO CESAR LOYA GARCIA ON 06/29/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER- UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00 SERVED MAY-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JULIO CESAR LOYA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, MARLENE RAMOS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JULIO CESAR LOYA GARCIA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
